title: The Midnight Sky
plot: A scientist is working alone at a remote Arctic research station when he learns of a mysterious global disaster. At the same time, he meets a strange girl in the Arctic, with whom he must stop the return to Earth of the crew of the spaceship "Aether".
actors: George Clooney, Felicity Jones, David Oyelowo

categories.label: research stations at the end of the world
categories.description: Human presence on the polar continent depends on small, isolated stations built to keep people alive amid lethal cold, distance, and darkness. What you'll see: sealed corridors, generator rooms, ration stores, sleeping bunks, and windows looking out onto endless snow and ice.

categories.label: survival resting on fragile life-support
categories.description: In this frozen world, heat, power, air, medicine, and communications are not conveniences but the thin barrier between life and death. What you'll see: failing equipment, improvised repairs, fuel worries, battery checks, and every task measured against the cold outside.
